text: I absolutely hate it when people compare spellcards of one character to previous characters. Especially for EVERY SINGLE SPELLCARD that character shows. It's so annoying. When you compare it to 'stealing', you're essentially saying that ZUN has no creativity.
author: @TheVermilliaFamily

text:
The problem with that statement is that in this case it's referring to Nue, a character whose species is specifically an amalgamation of multiple animals. It would make sense for Nue to take more than a couple of cues from other characters.

And whether it was intentional or not, this all started when the initial reaction to Nue's appearance and theme song was "That looks/sounds a lot like Flandre's". And that wasn't a localized reaction, it was fairly widespread.

Again, that might not had been ZUN's intention (personally I like to think it was), but it was the end result.

text: Maybe I'm overanalyzing, but to me, Heian Alien sounds like a mix between the general styles of Touhou music. You have the insane side near the start, going into the epic style, then the calm and beautiful parts (Which is very fitting because her battle style is a combination of others). Thus, the different parts flow very well together.
